title: Setting up tasks with clients

posts.author: Sawtell (brianna)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello i am on a trial with monday.com and need help !
i require assistance setting up my dashboard to be efficient and need advice on the best way to go about it.
as we are a kitchen company with many clients coming in and going out with multiple tasks for each we need to organize the best way to assign tasks or customers to tasks
can anyone walk me through the best way to do this?
